case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. MARK ISAACS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT ISAACS, MARK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-11-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-27-2010
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-26-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-11-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-26-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
